lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: Me's not got no glug-glugs to sell, yous bring me da sickies glug-glug den me's open da stufsies for ya.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, what's going on here?

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: Dem's dead ogre's come out of da ground...dey's makin' da rest of us into sick-uns ...and dead-uns.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't sound good!

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: Grish want's da person go down der - see what's what!

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: Me's not got no glug-glugs to sell, yous bring me da sickies glug-glug den me's open da stufsies for ya.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: Hey yous creature...yous did good fings gedin that glug-glugs for da sickies! All is ogries pepels are not gettin dead cos of you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you selling?

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: Me's not got no glug-glugs to sell, yous bring me da sickies glug-glug den me's open da stufsies for ya.

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: Me's showin' you da stufsies for yous creatures!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, here you go! I brought you some of the potion which should cure the disease. You said that you would buy some from me.

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: Yous creatures is da funny ones...yous already solds me's ones now..and us can now sell un to yous!

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: Yous creatures done da good fing...yous get many bright pretties for dis...!

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: Yous gots da numbers?

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: I's thinks yous needs to thinks again.

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: Dats da right answer!

lines.speaker: Uglug Nar
lines.text: I's gots a thinky number puzzley for yous!
